items.name: iPhone 15
items.description: Experience the next generation of smartphone with Dynamic Island, a 48MP main camera, and a durable color-infused glass design.

items.name: Samsung Galaxy S23
items.description: Capture the night with cinematic Nightography, powered by the fastest Snapdragon processor yet for an elite gaming experience.

items.name: MacBook Pro
items.description: Supercharged for pros. Features a stunning Liquid Retina XDR display, extensive pro connectivity, and groundbreaking battery life.

items.name: iPad Pro
items.description: Astonishing performance with an advanced Liquid Retina display, ultra-fast wireless speeds, and support for Apple Pencil.

items.name: AirPods Pro
items.description: Featuring up to two times more Active Noise Cancellation, Adaptive Audio, and Personalized Spatial Audio for immersive sound.

items.name: Sony WH-1000XM4
items.description: Premium over-ear headphones delivering industry-leading noise cancellation, exceptional sound quality, and smart listening technology.

items.name: Men's Cotton T-Shirt
items.description: A classic wardrobe staple crafted from 100% premium breathable cotton, offering ultimate comfort and a perfect regular fit.

items.name: Men's Jeans
items.description: Durable slim-fit denim jeans with a subtle stretch for all-day comfort. Features a timeless 5-pocket styling.

items.name: Men's Jacket
items.description: Stylish and weather-resistant casual outerwear, designed to keep you warm and cozy during breezy days without compromising on style.

items.name: Women's Dress
items.description: An elegant and lightweight A-line dress with a flattering silhouette, perfect for both casual daytime outings and evening gatherings.

items.name: Women's Blazer
items.description: A sophisticated, tailored blazer featuring sharp lapels and a structured fit, designed to instantly elevate your office look or casual chic outfit.

items.name: Gold Necklace
items.description: A delicate and shimmering 14k gold chain necklace, featuring a minimalist design that adds a subtle touch of luxury to your everyday style.

items.name: Diamond Ring
items.description: A breathtaking sterling silver engagement ring featuring a brilliant-cut center diamond surrounded by a halo of micro-pave stones.

items.name: Silver Bracelet
items.description: An elegant, polished 925 sterling silver chain bracelet with a secure clasp. Ideal for stacking or wearing on its own.

items.name: Pearl Earrings
items.description: Timeless drop earrings featuring lustrous freshwater cultured pearls, perfectly suspended from elegant white gold studs.
